Our Story

We Started Because
Something Was Broken

Farmers in Andhra Pradesh were growing extraordinary millets — ancient grains full of nutrition, history, and life. But between the field and your kitchen, something was going wrong. Middlemen. Polishing. Long chains that stripped the grain of its goodness and the farmer of fair pay.

We saw this and decided to act. ANNAVYA FOODS was built in Rayadurg on a single conviction: that the person who grows your food deserves to be known, and the food you eat deserves to be honest.

"We do not move millets through a system. We carry them from hands we trust to families who deserve the truth about what they eat."

Today we collect directly from farmers we know personally, process with minimal intervention in our own unit in Rayadurg, and deliver — unpolished, pure, and full of the nutrition nature put there.

Direct Farmer Partnership Rayadurg, Andhra Pradesh  ·  Est. 2026

Foxtail Millet

Little Millet
సామలు  ·  Same  ·  Kutki

Highest in protein among small millets. Gentle on digestion. Ideal for growing children.

500 g1 kgBulk
Kodo Millet
అరికెలు  ·  Harka  ·  Varagu

500 g1 kgBulk
Browntop Millet
అందుకొర్రలు  ·  Korale

500 g1 kgBulk
Barnyard Millet
ఉద్దలు  ·  Sanwa  ·  Jhangora

500 g1 kgBulk
Ragi Millet
రాగి  ·  Kelvaragu  ·  Mandua

India's most iron-rich grain. Combats anaemia. Builds lasting strength from the inside out.

500 g1 kgBulk
Pearl Millet
సజ్జ  ·  Bajra  ·  Kambu

Cooling and hydrating. Ideal for warm climates. Rich in magnesium and zinc.

500 g1 kgBulk
Jowar (Sorghum)
జొన్న  ·  Jonna  ·  Jwar

Versatile and gluten-free. The foundation of traditional Indian cooking. Timeless and nourishing.

500 g1 kgBulk

The People Behind Every Grain

These are not suppliers.
They are the reason
we exist.

We know every farmer by name. We visit their fields. We understand what they grow and why. When you buy ANNAVYA FOODS millets, a fair price reaches back to these hands — the hands that make everything possible. This is what direct sourcing really means.

Our Foundation  ·  Andhra Pradesh

Transparency in Every Step

From the Field to Your Family

Our processing unit in Rayadurg is where care meets craft. Every grain that arrives from our farmers is handled with one purpose — to deliver it to you as close to its natural state as possible.

01

Direct Collection from Farmers

We travel to the farms ourselves. No broker, no mandi middleman. We buy at fair prices and collect at peak harvest freshness.

02

Cleaning & Sorting

Grains are cleaned to remove impurities using our in-house machinery. Every batch is inspected for quality and consistency.

03

Minimal Processing — No Polishing

We stop where most others keep going. No polishing. No chemical treatment. The grain's natural nutrition stays completely intact.

04

Quality Testing

Each batch is tested before it leaves our unit. We stand behind every pack we send out — that is a commitment, not a claim.

05

Packed Fresh & Delivered

Sealed in premium packaging to preserve freshness. 500 g and 1 kg for families. 30 kg and above for businesses. Delivered to you directly.

Our Values, Not Just Our Features

Why Discerning Families & Businesses Choose Us

Genuinely Unpolished

Polishing makes grains look better and last longer on shelves — at the cost of fiber, B-vitamins, and minerals. We refuse to polish. What the farmer grew is what you receive.

Farmer Relationships, Not Transactions

We visit the fields. We know the people. When the farmer thrives, the grain is better. This is not a supply chain — it is a partnership built on trust.

Own Processing — Full Control

Our unit in Rayadurg means we never hand your grain to a third party. We control every step from collection to packing, ensuring consistency and hygiene throughout.

Built for Bulk and Retail Both

Whether you are a family ordering 1 kg or a restaurant chain ordering 300 kg, you receive the same grain, the same honesty, and the same care in every single pack.

Zero Additives, Zero Compromises

No preservatives. No artificial colouring. No chemical treatment of any kind. We believe your food should contain exactly what it says on the pack — and nothing else.

Reviving Heritage for the Future

Millets fed India for thousands of years before processed grains arrived. We are not selling a trend. We are restoring a food culture that was always right.

What Drives Us

Our Vision & Mission

Vision

A Healthier India,
One Grain at a Time

To rebuild the connection between modern Indian families and the traditional grains that sustained generations before us — creating a food system where farmers are respected, nutrition is preserved, and families know the truth about what they eat.

Mission

Farm Direct.
Family First. Always.

To source naturally grown millets directly from Andhra Pradesh farmers, process them with complete integrity at our own unit in Rayadurg, and deliver unpolished, authentic nutrition to every household and business that chooses to eat honestly.
